title: Potamophila leersioides
taxonomy: Potamophila leersioides is classified as a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It belongs to the genus Potamophila. The family Cyperaceae is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous flowering plants. The genus Potamophila is typically found in wetland environments and is native to Africa. The classification of Potamophila leersioides is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Order: Poales, Family: Cyperaceae, Genus: Potamophila, Species: P. leersioides.
